title: May 31, 2021: Nutrition Science Advisory Committee: Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Science Advisory Committee (NSAC): Third Meeting Agenda
- Review and approve the Record of Proceedings from the second meeting
- Discuss and provide advice on questions asked related to Health Canada's presentation on Monitoring to discern and understand new and emerging trends impacting the nutritional health of Canadians
